"'''Exposing the YT-1300 Transport: Secrets of the ''Falcon'''''" is an article written by [[Christopher West]] and appearing in the pages of the gaming magazine [[Polyhedron 162]]/Dungeon Magazine 103 with a cover date of [[October]] [[2003]]. This extensive article attempts to clear up some of the discrepancies of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] and provides a history, as well as interior maps by West himself, of the two [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] variations of which the ''Falcon'' is an amalgamation. Also included is a full-color, full page interior map of the ''Falcon'' itself, as well as a detailed breakdown of the function of each part of all the ships' interiors.
